name: Cyber-Trap / Alt-Pop
short_style: dark cyber-trap, mid-tempo, rubbery sub-bass, detuned bells, close-mic male vocals
detailed_style: dark cyber-trap, mid-tempo swung bounce, rubbery sub-bass, tight minimal trap drums, detuned bells, cold synth pads, close-mic male vocals with whispered doubles
exclude: no upbeat, no acoustic instruments, no electric guitar, no bright pop, no live drums, no female vocals, no autotune
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Write verse
Voice should sound close, intimate
Minimal instruments, only sub-bass and bells
Words land right on the beat

[Pre-Chorus]
Tension rises, percussion layers are added
Transition section before the explosion

[Chorus]
Write the English hook here (bright and wide)
Catchy melody that stays in your head
Exploding with distorted bass swells
Let the sound open up fully

[Verse 2]
Second verse
Energy slightly higher than the first
Rhythm gets tighter

[Bridge]
Contrast release, vulnerable vocals
Almost silence, only deep pads
Before the final chord

[Final Chorus]
Write the English hook here (repeated for climax)
Maximum stereo widening and power

[Outro]
Smooth fade into darkness

name: Glitchy Industrial / Electro
short_style: cold industrial electro, metallic percussion, distorted synth bass, spoken male vocals
detailed_style: cold industrial electro, driving relentless 4/4 beat, metallic percussion, distorted synth bass, crisp synth stabs, glitched vocal chops, spoken male vocals with robotic harmonies, drum machine bridge with high-pass filter and evolving textures
exclude: no acoustic guitar, no warm piano, no soft acoustic drums, no emotional ballad, no female vocals, no ambient drone
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Words are delivered monotonously, like commands
Bass cuts space into pieces
Industrial cold, precise rhythm

[Chorus]
Voices multiply in metallic echoes
Synths explode in the foreground
Wall of sound

[Verse 2]
Continuing the recitative
Rhythm shifts, tension builds
Electronic madness

[Bridge]

[Final Chorus]
Repeat chorus with maximum sound density

[Outro]
Abrupt break or decay into cold silence

name: Ethereal Ambient / Drone
short_style: ambient drone, evolving pads, low analog rumble, ethereal female vocals
detailed_style: ambient drone, glacial tempo, slowly drifting melodic loops, evolving synth pads, deep sub-bass pulse, granular textures, distant ethereal female vocals with heavy reverb
exclude: no drums, no percussion, no beats, no fast tempo, no heavy guitars, no aggressive vocals, no pop hooks
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Words float through endless reverb
There is no clear rhythm here
Sound breathes, rolls in waves
Drifting tonalities

[Chorus]
(Ooh... Aah... Ethereal vocals without words)
Shimmering sound textures
Maximum stereo width

[Bridge]

[Outro]
Slow fading into silence

name: Moody Alt-Rock / Pop-Rock
short_style: moody alt-rock, muted electric guitars, dry male vocals, wide chorus
detailed_style: moody mid-tempo alt-rock, clean acoustic guitar intro with simple drum click, palm-muted electric guitars in verses, dry upfront male vocals, wide overdriven guitar chords on chorus, tight acoustic drums, melancholic atmosphere
exclude: no synthwave, no 808 bass, no trap hi-hats, no electronic drops, no brass, no bright synth leads, no auto-tune
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Dry, honest vocals without excessive effects
Guitars sound muted
The story begins quietly

[Pre-Chorus]
Bass guitar kicks in, drum density builds
The wall of sound prepares to open up

[Chorus]
Guitar explosion, overdriven chords
Vocals become powerful and soaring
Emotional peak

[Verse 2]
Drop back into verses
Drums hold the groove, guitar enters with sparse strokes

[Bridge]
Full release, only keys and voice
All the song's vulnerability concentrated here

[Final Chorus]
Final powerful chorus

[Outro]
Sustained guitar chord, slow drum fade

name: Cinematic / Epic / Shamanic
short_style: cinematic orchestral, shamanic percussion, building tension, heroic choir
detailed_style: cinematic orchestral, slow building tension, organic woodwind and low strings intro, shamanic acoustic drums, deep brass swell, sweeping string section, heroic male vocal choir harmonies, epic soundscape, solo acoustic instrument bridge with quiet strings
exclude: no synthesizers, no electronic beats, no trap drums, no auto-tune, no rap, no pop structure, no electric guitar
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Deep throat vocals
Repeating hypnotic phrases
Percussion holds an ancient, primal rhythm

[Pre-Chorus]
Orchestra expands, brass enters
Tempo accelerates and thickens

[Chorus]
Choir explodes with a triumphant melody
Powerful timpani strikes
Epic grandeur

[Bridge]
A lone flute or string instrument in silence
Short breather before the finale

[Final Chorus]
Final battle, all instruments at maximum energy

[Outro]
Reverb tail, a lone percussion hit and silence

name: Heavy Metal
short_style: heavy metal, distorted palm-muted guitars, double bass drums, aggressive male vocals
detailed_style: heavy metal, fast palm-muted riffs, double bass drums, aggressive shouted male vocals, dark atmosphere, raw production, half-time groove bridge with solo guitar
exclude: no synthesizers, no electronic beats, no clean vocals, no pop melody, no trap drums, no auto-tune, no acoustic instruments, no lo-fi
lyrics_template:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Words spit like venom
Guitars chug in tight sync with the kick drum
Rhythm section locked in
Darkness builds with every bar

[Pre-Chorus]
The riff opens up
Drums swell toward the breakdown

[Chorus]
Wall of distortion crashes down
Double bass relentless
Catchy but crushing hook
Everything at full volume

[Bridge]
Guitar solo over pounding rhythm
A moment of pure instrumental fury

[Final Chorus]
Final assault, all energy released

[Outro]
Riffs slow down to a crushing halt
One last hit
